task_completion.description: Open the Watchlist menu or management interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Watchlist' menu is expanded or the Watchlist management dialog is open in the JStock application.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Watchlist' dialog, input prompt, or creation form is visible on the screen.
The exact text 'Dividend Stocks' is typed into the new watchlist name input field.

task_completion.description: Confirm and save the new watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'OK', 'Save', or presses Enter to confirm the creation of the 'Dividend Stocks' watchlist, closing the input dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the new watchlist appears in the Watchlist menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Watchlist dropdown, menu, or tab clearly displays 'Dividend Stocks' alongside 'My Watchlist' in the JStock UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock GUI to create the watchlist.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with JStock's menus and dialogs, not terminal commands (like mkdir) to create the directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible and active, rather than a text editor, file manager, or mock application.

integrity.description: The agent followed the UI creation process rather than renaming existing files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'New Watchlist' dialog or equivalent UI element in JStock was used to input the name, rather than renaming folders in a file explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: JStock version 1.0.7.60 is used. Creating a watchlist via the UI creates a corresponding directory at /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist/Dividend Stocks/. The VLM should verify that the new watchlist 'Dividend Stocks' is visible within the JStock GUI's Watchlist menu or tabs, confirming the UI was used to trigger the directory creation.
